productDisplayName: Arrow Woman Bow Off White Top
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 95% viscose cotton and 5% lycra, has long puffed sleeves and embellishments Fit Regular Wash care Wash with warm water Do not bleach, use chlorine or iron on print Use warm iron arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic.
